sections.title: Identity and Access (Azure AD / Entra ID)

items.title: MFA enforced for privileged roles
items.description: Require MFA for Global Admin, Security Admin, and privileged roles.
items.how_to_find: AZURE portal → Identity and Access (Azure AD / Entra ID). Audit configuration against "MFA enforced for privileged roles". CLI: use `az` to list resources and IAM bindings. Run Prowler (`prowler azure`) or Defender/Security Command Center for misconfig findings.
items.how_to_fix: Require MFA for Global Admin, Security Admin, and privileged roles. Apply CIS benchmark controls: least-privilege IAM, private endpoints, encryption with customer-managed keys, centralized logging, and alert rules for policy changes. Document exceptions and set remediation SLAs by severity.

Apply CIS benchmark controls: least-privilege IAM, private endpoints, encryption with customer-managed keys, centralized logging, and alert rules for policy changes. Document exceptions and set remediation SLAs by severity.
